revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-6-250

A mechanical switching device for earthing parts of a circuit, capable of withstanding for a specified time currents under abnormal conditions such as short-circuit, but not required to carry currents under normal circuit conditions.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Earthing switch}}
